title: Physics-informed Neural Motion Planning via Domain Decomposition in Large Environments
title_zh: 基于物理信息的神经运动规划：大环境下的域分解方法
abstract: Physics-informed Neural Motion Planners (PiN- MPs) provide a data-efficient framework for solving the Eikonal Partial Differential Equation (PDE) and representing the cost-to-go function for motion planning. However, their scalability remains limited by spectral bias and the complex loss landscape of PDE-driven training. Domain decomposition mitigates these issues by dividing the environment into smaller subdomains, but existing methods enforce continuity only at individual spatial points. While effective for function approximation, these methods fail to capture the spatial connectivity required for motion planning, where the cost- to-go function depends on both the start and goal coordinates rather than a single query point. We propose Finite Basis Neural Time Fields (FB-NTFields), a novel neural field representation for scalable cost-to-go estimation. Instead of enforcing continuity in output space, FB-NTFields construct a latent space representation, computing the cost-to-go as a distance between the latent embeddings of start and goal coordinates. This enables global spatial coherence while integrating domain decomposition, ensuring efficient large-scale motion planning. We validate FB-NTFields in complex synthetic and real-world scenarios, demonstrating substantial improvements over existing PiNMPs. Finally, we deploy our method on a Unitree B1 quadruped robot, successfully navigating indoor environments. The supplementary videos can be found at https://youtu.be/OpRuCbLNOwM.
abstract_zh: 物理信息神经运动规划器（PiN-MPs）提供了一种数据高效的框架，用于求解Eikonal偏微分方程（PDE）并表示运动规划中的代价函数。然而，其可扩展性受到谱偏差和PDE驱动训练的复杂损失景观的限制。域分解通过将环境划分为更小的子域来缓解这些问题，但现有方法仅在单个空间点处强制连续性。虽然这对函数逼近有效，但这些方法无法捕捉运动规划所需的空间连通性，因为代价函数依赖于起点和终点坐标，而非单个查询点。我们提出有限基神经时间场（FB-NTFields），一种用于可扩展代价估计的新型神经场表示。FB-NTFields不在输出空间强制连续性，而是构建潜在空间表示，将代价计算为起点和终点潜在嵌入之间的距离。这实现了全局空间一致性，同时整合了域分解，确保了高效的大规模运动规划。我们在复杂的合成和真实场景中验证了FB-NTFields，展示了相比现有PiN-MPs的显著改进。最后，我们将方法部署在Unitree B1四足机器人上，成功实现了室内环境导航。补充视频见https://youtu.be/OpRuCbLNOwM。
tldr_zh: 提出FB-NTFields，通过潜在空间域分解实现大规模运动规划的高效代价估计。
cover_zh: 机器人导航新突破｜不用逐点约束，潜在空间域分解让规划更高效
